mapper.select: select id, group_id as groupId, uploader_user_id as uploaderUserId, file_name as fileName, file_ext as fileExt, content_type as contentType, file_size as fileSize, file_hash as fileHash, storage_bucket as storageBucket, storage_object_key as storageObjectKey, status, deleted, failure_reason as failureReason, preview_text as previewText, uploaded_at as uploadedAt, processed_at as processedAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from documents where id = #{documentId} and group_id = #{groupId} and deleted = false

select id, group_id as groupId, uploader_user_id as uploaderUserId, file_name as fileName, file_ext as fileExt, content_type as contentType, file_size as fileSize, file_hash as fileHash, storage_bucket as storageBucket, storage_object_key as storageObjectKey, status, deleted, failure_reason as failureReason, preview_text as previewText, uploaded_at as uploadedAt, processed_at as processedAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from documents where group_id = #{groupId} and file_hash = #{fileHash} and status = 'READY' and deleted = false order by uploaded_at desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update documents set status = #{toStatus}, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, processed_at = #{processedAt}, updated_at = now() where status = #{fromStatus} and deleted = false
and updated_at < #{staleBefore}
